MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gordon Yamamoto, Gordon Yamamoto Professional Corporation, 415.644.4817, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

Hearing held regarding the Order To Show Cause Re: Contempt Sanctions. Mr. Yamamoto stated that the other side would not be making an appearance today, that there is a stipulated judgment, and that the other side has requested until next Thursday to make the full payment. The Court took the matter under submission. Judge Pro Tem Katherine Huibonhoa, Clerk J. Alameda, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Appearances on Tuesday, October 22, 2013:
Gordon Y. Yamamoto, Esq. [415.644.4817] appearing for Plaintiffs;
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. [415.922.5939] specially appearing for Defendants

HEARING - R U L I N G: Order To Show Cause Why Sanctions Should Not Be Imposed Pursuant To CCP 177.5 As To Defendant Michael Schimmel Re Contempt. The Court finds Mr. Roe Guilty of Contempt. The Court further orders Mr. Roe to pay a fine of $1,500 to the Court and pay sanctions to the Plaintiff in the amount of $2,000. The Court sets a hearing for Order to Show Cause Re: Contempt Sanctions including Jail Time for November 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 302. Order issued after hearing. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth L. Riles; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Otion To Compel Attendance And Testimony Of Eric Roe At Deposition, Production Of Business Of Records, For Determination Of Concept
Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Gordon Y. Yamamoto, Esq. of the Law Office of Gordon Y. Yamamoto, Tel. 415.494.4700, for plaintiffs and moving party;
No other appearance.

The tentative ruling was uncontested. The Court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFFs YAN KALIKA and AA CONDOS LLC's Motion To Compel Attendance And Testimony Of Eric Roe At Deposition, Production Of Business Of Records, For Determination Of Concept. Defendant Schimmel's request to continue the hearing is denied. Plaintiffs' motions to compel are granted in part. Eric Roe is ordered to produce by January 11, 2013, to the plaintiffs' attorney at 235 Montgomery Street, Suite 824, San Francisco, CA, all documents requested in the deposition subpoenas and notices served on him except as to any requested documents to which either he or defendant Schimmel files a motion to quash by January 11, 2013. Eric Roe is ordered to appear for his deposition at 235 Montgomery Street, Suite 824, San Francisco, CA, no later than January 21, 2013. Not later than January 4, 2013, the parties shall meet and confer as to the exact date and time of the deposition and inform the court in writing either of the date and time upon which they agreed, or that they haven't agreed and on what date and time each of them wants the deposition to proceed. If the parties do not agree upon a date and time and so inform the court by January 4, 2013, then the court will select a date and time. Sanctions are denied. The court believes that a better meet and confer effort by both sides would likely have avoided this motion over scheduling. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
